creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I don't see the obvious reason why we should keep this open. The 
controller reports that it has problems at a certain datapoint, can you 
do an investigation on the controller to see what the problem is ? (In 
my world the reason that the error is given, is precomputed and thus 
with a reason ,so if the system reports this, then there is something 
wrong with the controller, the OS cannot be held responsible for that, 
right?).
